name: 个人安全
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 健康与福祉 / Health & Wellbeing / Health & Wellbeing
curriculum_points: Students will be able to identify trusted adults in their community and articulate clear safety rules for different contexts, including digital environments.
Students in Middle/Upper Primary will be able to assess potential risks, assert their right to safety, and demonstrate responsible decision-making to protect themselves and others.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
